title: Page Breaks and Landscape functionality in Monday Docs
excerpt: Would it be possible to have the functionality in Monday Docs to be able to create A4 page breaks and Landscape view as this would super charge the ability to use the docs for official documentation.

posts.author: Ben_Muncaster (Ben )
